title: Intense Resinous Southern Thai Polish Kabanos Khanom Thai
description: A resinous and juicy Southern Thai dish featuring Polish kabanos, long-fermentation-dough, and raw-friendly ingredients, formed into khanom-thai.

ingredients.name: Long-fermentation-dough
ingredients.notes: made with rice flour and coconut milk

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix the long-fermentation-dough with coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, and palm sugar to form a sticky dough.
Wrap the Polish kabanos slices with the dough, forming small khanom-thai shapes.
Bake the khanom-thai for 15 minutes, or until the dough is golden brown.
Meanwhile, blend the Southern Thai curry paste with coconut milk and dates to form a resinous sauce.
Heat the sauce in a pan over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Add the baked khanom-thai to the sauce and simmer for 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped Thai basil and toasted peanuts.
